purpose: Deletion-safe routing backlog for supplied AP/A-level chemistry and physics PDFs. These are not cards unless status is carded.

status_key.next: Strong next card after v0 hardening.
status_key.candidate: Promising but missing a declaration or later-layer convention.
status_key.defer: Recorded, but outside the narrow v0 attachment grammar.
status_key.refusal: Formula-sheet surface is not a module object by itself.
